title: dolichocentrum furcatum
intro: Dolichocentrum furcatum, also known as the mountain mint or Mexican mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dolichocentrum furcatum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches. Dolichocentrum furcatum can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or used as a tincture or essential oil in traditional herbal preparations.
